objective:
FICHE_STRATEGIE v1
id: momentum_macd
archetype: momentum_macd
family: momentum
timeframe: 1h
side: both
indicators:
- macd(fast_period=13, slow_period=20, signal_period=7)
- rsi(period=15)
- atr(period=14)
entry:
- long: cross_up(macd.macd, macd.signal) and rsi > 35 and rsi < 65
- short: cross_down(macd.macd, macd.signal) and rsi > 30 and rsi < 60
exit:
- condition: sign_change(macd.histogram) or rsi > 80 or rsi < 20
risk:
stop_atr_mult: 2.5
tp_atr_mult: 4.5
description: ATR stop-loss (2.5x) and take-profit (4.5x)
constraints:
- no_lookahead: true
- only_registry_indicators: true

iterations.hypothesis: Combining the momentum and MACD indicators enhances trend following capabilities by capturing price breakouts.

iterations.hypothesis: This strategy seeks to improve results by using Bollinger bands and RSI with an ATR based risk management technique. The hypothesis explains why this combination should work better than standalone indicators.
